greeting.morning: Good morning. What data shall we explore?

greeting.evening: Evening session. Let's explore some data
greeting.lateNight: Late night science 🔬 The best discoveries happen after hours

metadata.appDescription: Bioinfoflow is the local-first, agentic platform that turns biological intent into reproducible pipelines. Run complex workflows on your own data without uploads.

toasts.logoutFailed: Couldn't sign you out. Check your connection and try again.

hints.remotePath: Agent commands and file inspection run from this remote folder on the selected SSH host.

detail.hostOnly: NVIDIA tools are available on the host, but the container cannot see GPUs yet. CPU workflows can run now. {recommendation}
detail.error: GPU status is unavailable for now. CPU workflows can run now. Details: {error}
detail.cpuOnly: GPU is not enabled. CPU workflows can run now.

detail.fail: Create at least one project so chats and runs have a real workspace.

demo.title: Run Demo
demo.subtitle: Select a demo to run
demo.fastqQCDescription: Run quality control on FASTQ files

accessibility.celebrationsPaused: Milestone confetti paused by reduced motion

hero.title: Bioinfoflow
hero.description: Full 30X whole genome sequencing analysis in under 2 hours on your RTX 4090.
hero.wgsHighlight: Free for personal use. Your data never leaves your machine.
hero.chatExample: Analyze my whole genome sequencing data from /data/wgs using Parabricks.
hero.workflowDescription: Parabricks Germline → FASTQ to BAM → VCF

productTabs.title: Built for bioinformatics
productTabs.subtitle: Everything you need to plan, run, and monitor computational biology workflows.

agent.label: Agent
agent.title: Ask in plain language. Get reproducible pipelines.
agent.description: Describe your analysis goal and let the agent plan the optimal workflow. No scripting required — just scientific intent.
agent.chatExample1: Analyze my ChIP-seq data for H3K27ac peaks
agent.chatExample2: I'll set up nf-core/chipseq with MACS2 peak calling...

workflows.label: Workflows
workflows.title: Curated nf-core + local WDLs, ready to run.
workflows.description: Access a registry of validated workflows from nf-core and your own custom pipelines. Version-controlled and reproducible.

runs.label: Runs
runs.title: Trace, resume, or retry with full audit history.
runs.description: Every run is logged with full provenance. Resume failed jobs, compare runs, and maintain complete audit trails.

images.label: Images
images.title: Manage Docker runtimes with versioned certainty.
images.description: All containers are tracked and versioned. Reproducible environments for every step of your pipeline.

bento.title: Why Bioinfoflow?
bento.subtitle: Built from the ground up for computational biology workflows.

gpu.title: GPU-Accelerated WGS
gpu.description: Run 30X whole genome sequencing in under 2 hours using your RTX 4090. Parabricks-powered, free for personal use.

agentic.title: Agentic Planning
agentic.description: Describe your analysis goal in plain language. The agent plans the optimal workflow, selects tools, and configures parameters.

local.title: Local-First Compute
local.description: Your data never leaves your infrastructure. Run compute-heavy workflows on your own machines or cluster.

artifacts.title: Reproducible Artifacts
artifacts.description: Every run stores its config, samplesheet, and environment. Re-run any analysis months later with identical results.

observability.title: Real-time Observability
observability.description: Watch your pipeline execute with DAG visualization, streaming logs, and resource utilization metrics.

hardware.title: Ready to run WGS?
hardware.subtitle: Check if your gaming PC can handle professional-grade genome analysis.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: From biological question to reproducible results in four steps.

step1.title: Select Workspace
step1.description: Choose your local data folder. Your files stay where they are.

step2.title: Describe Intent
step2.description: Tell the agent what analysis you need in plain language.

step3.title: Agent Plans
step3.description: AI selects the optimal workflow and generates configuration.

step4.title: Run & Monitor
step4.description: Execute locally with real-time DAG, logs, and results.

quote.label: Our vision
quote.text: Make computational biology accessible to everyone, powered by AI.

results.title: What you get
results.subtitle: Core capabilities that make bioinformatics workflows faster and more reliable.

wgsSpeed.title: 30X WGS in < 2 Hours
wgsSpeed.description: Run complete whole genome sequencing analysis on your RTX 4090 at home. No cloud required.

nlp.title: Natural Language to Pipeline
nlp.description: Describe your analysis in plain English. Get a configured, ready-to-run workflow.

zeroData.title: Zero Data Movement
zeroData.description: Process terabytes of sequencing data without uploading. Your files stay on your infrastructure.

provenance.title: Full Provenance
provenance.description: Every run captures exact versions, parameters, and outputs. Reproduce any analysis, anytime.

comparison.title: Typical workflow comparison
comparison.note: Based on internal benchmarks comparing manual nf-core configuration vs. agent-assisted setup for RNA-seq workflows.

security.title: Your data, your control
security.subtitle: Built for sensitive biological data. Run analyses without compromising security or compliance.

dataNeverLeaves.title: Data never leaves
dataNeverLeaves.description: Your files stay on your machine by default. No cloud uploads required.

auditTrails.title: Full audit trails
auditTrails.description: Every run logged with complete provenance and timestamps.

localArtifacts.title: Local artifacts
localArtifacts.description: Configs, samplesheets, and results stored in your workspace.

secureByDesign.title: Secure by design
secureByDesign.description: Built with research data compliance requirements in mind.

yourInfrastructure.title: Your infrastructure
yourInfrastructure.description: Run on your HPC, cloud, or local workstation.

transparentExecution.title: Transparent execution
transparentExecution.description: See exactly what runs, where, and how at every step.

cta.title: Ready to try it?
cta.subtitle: Run your first pipeline in minutes. Free for individual researchers.

footer.tagline: Local-first, agentic bioinformatics workflows for research teams.

auth.title: Sign in to continue
auth.description: Enter your team's Bioinfoflow workspace. Projects, runs, conversations, and file views stay shared inside one protected research space.
auth.terms: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.errorMessage: We couldn't start the sign-in flow. Please try again.
auth.enableProviders: Add OAuth credentials in your environment to enable all providers.
auth.noProviders: No authentication providers are configured yet. Enable local email/password or add OAuth credentials.

teamCard.title: Workspace
teamCard.adminCreated: Accounts are created by an owner or admin.

local.errorMessage: That email or password didn't work. Try again or ask an admin to reset it.
local.adminProvisioned: Bioinfoflow does not offer open registration in team mode. Ask your lab admin to create or reset your account.
local.personalProvisioned: This instance is protected with a local owner account. Use your local credentials to continue.

preview.title: One lab workspace. Shared context. Clear accountability.
preview.description: The app stays intentionally lightweight: one workspace for the instance, shared operational views for the team, and personal identity only for access, audits, and member management.
preview.chatTitle: Chats, runs, and files stay aligned
preview.chatExample: Run differential expression on my RNA-seq data
preview.chatAgent1: I'll set up a standard RNA-seq DE pipeline. How many samples do you have?
preview.chatUser2: 3 treated vs 3 control, paired-end reads on /data/rnaseq.
preview.personalDescription: Personal mode keeps the full app behind login without bringing team administration into your daily workflow.
preview.tagline: Simple enough for a private workstation. Structured enough for a research group.

owner.name: Owner
owner.description: Bootstrap authority, final recovery path, never lose the instance.

admin.name: Admin
admin.description: Create users, reset passwords, disable accounts, and keep the lab moving.

member.name: Member
member.description: Run analyses, inspect results, and collaborate inside the shared workspace.

demo.description: Enter the public Bioinfoflow demo. The product UI is real, while runs, chat activity, and workflow playback are scripted for a smooth walkthrough.
demo.oauthHint: These GitHub and Google actions are demo-friendly entry buttons. They unlock the seeded workspace without requiring a real external sign-in.
demo.title: Walk through the real app shell with a polished demo workspace.
demo.subtitle: Open the seeded project, submit the scripted workflow, watch runs progress, and return to the agent without losing the conversation state.
demo.previewTitle: One seeded workspace, five real pages, zero setup friction
demo.previewResponse: I'll launch the prepared RNA-seq walkthrough, mirror the run state across pages, and keep the full chat history intact while you explore.

scheduler.title: Scheduler
scheduler.subtitle: Dispatch queue, resource pressure, and active workload in one operations view.
scheduler.refreshDescription: Counts are refreshed on a timer, not streamed live.
scheduler.resourceSnapshotPendingBody: Live capacity data will appear as soon as the resource stream sends its first snapshot.
scheduler.resourcesUnavailableBody: This usually means the scheduler is running in fallback mode or resource sampling is disabled.

cardDescriptions.queued: Runs waiting in the scheduler queue before a worker can claim them.
cardDescriptions.dispatched: Runs currently claimed by workers and expected to be executing.
cardDescriptions.completed: Tasks the scheduler has seen finish successfully since startup.
cardDescriptions.failed: Tasks that ended in failure and may need investigation or retry.

status.activeBody: New runs are being written to the scheduler queue and claimed by workers from persistent state.
status.fallbackTitle: Persistent mode is configured, but fallback is active
status.fallbackBody: The app is serving runs without an active persistent scheduler instance, so queue visibility and recovery features are limited.

guidance.title: How to use this page
guidance.body: Use this page to answer why runs are not starting: queue backlog, worker saturation, fallback mode, or local resource pressure.
guidance.queueBody: You are submitting runs faster than workers can claim them, or the scheduler is intentionally delaying work.
guidance.dispatchBody: Workers are busy. Check run logs and duration patterns in Runs for the actual workload details.
guidance.resourcesBody: CPU, memory, or disk pressure may keep new work waiting even when the queue is healthy.

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load scheduler status. Check that the backend is running.

messages.healthy: Resources are available for new dispatches.
messages.moderate: Dispatch may slow if CPU or memory continues rising.
messages.saturated: Hold new dispatches until pressure drops.

idle.title: Idle
idle.body: No runs are executing or waiting; newly dispatched runs will appear here.

queued.title: Waiting to dispatch
queued.body: Runs are queued, but no worker has started executing one yet.

disconnected.title: Live stream disconnected
disconnected.body: Reconnect the resource stream to see currently executing runs.

advanced.comingSoonBody: This pane will embed the live btop process view once the pty bridge ships. Until then, use the default panel for pressure and run-level attribution.
advanced.unavailable: btop was not found by the backend service
advanced.unavailableBody: Set BTOP_BIN or make sure the service PATH includes btop, then reopen this drawer.

legend.window: 60s window · 2s tick · click a run to highlight

audit.emptyDescription: Audit trail entries will appear here as actions are performed on this run.

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load audit trail. Refresh and try again.

batch.title: Submit Batch
batch.description: Submit multiple runs as a batch

errors.minTwoRuns: Add at least 2 runs to the batch
errors.submitFailed: Couldn't submit the batch. Check inputs and try again.

notificationConfig.title: Notifications
notificationConfig.description: Configure webhook notifications for run events
notificationConfig.emptyDescription: Add a webhook to receive notifications when runs complete, fail, or are cancelled.

errors.loadFailed: Couldn't load notifications. Refresh and try again.
errors.createFailed: Couldn't create notification. Check the webhook URL.

welcome.title: Start your first analysis
welcome.subtitle: Choose a project template or create a custom workspace. Once a project exists, Bioinfoflow can keep chats, files, and runs aligned in one place.
welcome.blankDescription: Start with an empty project for ad hoc exploration
welcome.customProjectDescription: Need a custom folder structure, naming scheme, or workspace path? Start with a blank project and configure it yourself.

connections.title: SSH hosts
connections.subtitle: Manage saved SSH hosts for remote work and workflow runs.

list.error: Could not load SSH connections. Check the service and try again.
list.noResults: No matching connections. Try another name, host, alias, or note.

authDescriptions.password: Enter the SSH password Bioinfoflow should use from the backend.
authDescriptions.private_key: Paste or upload a private key. Bioinfoflow stores it encrypted.
authDescriptions.ssh_config: Use a Host alias from the backend container's SSH config.
authDescriptions.key_file: Use a private-key path that exists inside the backend container.
authDescriptions.agent: Use SSH_AUTH_SOCK from the backend container environment.

nextflowHpc.name: Nextflow HPC
nextflowHpc.text:
Load the site environment before diagnostics.
Run module load nextflow when modules are available.
Check workflow outputs, .nextflow.log, and task directories under work/ before reruns.

slurmDiagnostics.name: Slurm diagnostics
slurmDiagnostics.text:
Use squeue, sacct, sinfo, and tail recent scheduler logs for diagnostics.
Avoid cancelling jobs unless the user explicitly asks.

readonlyInspection.name: Read-only inspection
readonlyInspection.text:
Inspect directories and files first.
Only run short diagnostic commands and keep outputs bounded.

probe.title: Command check
probe.placeholder: Run a command check and the remote output will appear here.

errors.privateKeyRequired: Paste or upload a private key.
errors.keyPathRequired: Enter a backend-visible key file path.

placeholders.name: Lab GPU node
placeholders.privateKey: Paste an OpenSSH private key here
placeholders.skillInstructions: Remote roots, business CLIs, service URLs, safe commands, debug habits…

delete.title: Delete {name}?
delete.description: The agent will no longer be able to use this SSH host. This cannot be undone.
delete.notFound: Connection {name} no longer exists, so it was removed locally.
delete.conflict: Connection {name} is used by one or more remote projects and cannot be deleted.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Choose a focused theme and mode for the app shell.

celebrations.title: Quiet celebrations
celebrations.description: Show a short, one-time confetti burst when first setup milestones succeed.
celebrations.reducedMotion: Reduced motion is on, so confetti is paused.

agent.title: Agent defaults
agent.description: Choose how Bioinfoflow handles a new message while the agent is still working.

turnPolicy.label: During active responses
turnPolicy.description: Apply this behavior when you send a message before the current turn finishes.

interrupt.label: Interrupt current turn
interrupt.description: Stop the active response first, then send your new message as the next turn.

queue.label: Queue for next turn
queue.description: Keep the active response running and send your draft after it finishes.

settings.title: AI Providers
settings.subtitle: Configure your API keys and select which model powers the agent.

setupBanner.title: Configure an API key to start chatting with the AI agent.

providerCards.savedKeyPlaceholder: Key saved. Paste a new key to replace it.

registries.title: Container Registries
registries.description: Configure private registries used by image pulls and workflow registration.

form.subtitle: Use an HTTP(S) endpoint. Namespace is optional.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage who can enter this Bioinfoflow instance. Shared analysis resources remain visible inside the workspace; identity is used for access, audit, and administration.
members.lastOwner: At least one owner must remain active.
members.createDescription: Create a team account. If local auth is enabled, set an initial password here.

account.title: Account
account.description: Your identity is used for sign-in, auditing, and personal security settings.
account.changePasswordDescription: Update your local password and revoke other active sessions.

errors.remoteConnectionRequired: Select a remote host before browsing directories

errors.globalDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errors.notFoundDescription: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

agentCore.title: AgentCore
agentCore.selectProjectDescription: Choose a project from the sidebar to start an AgentCore session.
agentCore.sessionPending: Session will be created on first message
agentCore.emptyDescription: Describe the analysis you want to run, inspect, or repair.
agentCore.noFinalText: No final response was recorded for this turn.
agentCore.quickPreflightPrompt: Run a preflight check for this project's selected workflow and inputs.
agentCore.quickQcPrompt: Review the latest MultiQC or QC summaries and tell me whether the samples look usable.
agentCore.quickDiagnosePrompt: Diagnose the latest failed run and suggest the smallest safe fix.

agentRuntime.welcomeTitle: What should Bioinfoflow help you do today?

tokenUsage.label: Tokens
tokenUsage.aria: {total} tokens used in this session. {input} input, {output} output.
tokenUsage.title: Context window

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Review the links and search queries that support this answer.
sources.openWithCount: Open {count, plural, one {# source} other {# sources}}

artifacts.title: Artifacts
artifacts.emptyNoSession: Start a conversation to collect artifacts.
artifacts.emptyNoSessionDescription: Generated reports, tables, PDFs, HTML, and images will open here.
artifacts.emptyRunningDescription: Files created by the agent will appear in this panel.
artifacts.loadFailedDescription: Refresh the panel and try again.
artifacts.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this artifact yet.

renderer.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this file.
renderer.previewUnsupported: Native preview is not available for this file type.
renderer.openDefaultDescription: Open or download the file to continue in your default application.
renderer.noRenderableSource: The file needs a readable preview URL or inline content.
renderer.workbookLoadingDescription: Reading sheets and preparing a table preview.
renderer.workbookEmptyDescription: Open the file in a spreadsheet app to inspect hidden or empty sheets.
renderer.workbookTooLarge: This workbook is too large to preview safely.
renderer.textLoadingDescription: Reading file content and preparing a preview.
renderer.textTooLarge: This file is too large to preview safely.

toolsPanel.title: Workspace tools
toolsPanel.description: Open project files, review artifacts, or jump into runtime tools without leaving this conversation.

environment.title: Environment
environment.filesChanged: {count, plural, one {# file changed} other {# files changed}}

progress.empty: No tasks yet. The agent's checklist will appear here as it works.

todoDock.summary: {count, plural, one {# task left} other {# tasks left}}

files.title: Files
files.loadedOnly: Searching {count, plural, one {# loaded item} other {# loaded items}}
files.previewUnavailable: Preview is not available for this file.
files.previewUnsupported: Native preview is not available for this file type.
files.openDefaultDescription: Open or download the file to continue in your default application.
files.truncated: File is large and was truncated.

browser.title: Embedded browser
browser.empty: Enter a URL to preview a page.

guarded_auto.label: Approve for me
guarded_auto.description: Run low-risk actions automatically and ask for higher risk.

bypass.label: Full access
bypass.description: Run non-critical actions automatically while backend safety still blocks critical operations.

agent.disclaimer: Bioinfoflow Agents can make mistakes. Verify important results.
agent.selectProjectHint: Choose a project from the sidebar to start chatting

errorBoundary.exhausted: This content cannot be rendered after {count} attempts.

executionMode.askDescription: Prompt before running high-risk tools like runs, shell, and code execution.
executionMode.approveAllDescription: Also prompt on low-risk writes (file edits). Strictest mode.
executionMode.bypassDescription: Never prompt. The agent runs every tool automatically. Only use if you trust the plan.
executionMode.changeFailed: Could not change execution mode. Please try again.
